reviews.comment:
Lugar tranquilo, con todo lo que uno necesita, excelente limpieza en sus baños

(Translated by Google)
Quiet place, with everything you need, excellent clean bathrooms
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10917902775629832707/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMyZ2Vuc1hBEAE

reviews.comment:
Estuve el 21/4/22. No había combustible por problemas en lis surtidores. Todos a un tiempo?. Raro. Los baños un desastre. La atención de los playeros en consonancia. No ha mejorado nada en años.

(Translated by Google)
I was there on April 21, 2022. There was no fuel due to problems with the pumps. All at the same time? Strange. The restrooms were a disaster. The service from the attendants was equally bad. It hasn't improved at all in years.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10917902775629832707/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMydnBycWRBEAE

reviews.comment:

A must-see for any traveler! Clean restrooms, it's a shame the market isn't open 24 hours.

reviews.comment:
Cómo dispensación de combustible, bien. Siempre que haya disponibilidad general obviamente (abril 2022, hay carencia de gasoil en Argentina)
Baños, algunos tapados. El de varones que es el que conozco
Alimentos, medianas bien para ser una parada de ruta.

(Translated by Google)
Fueling is good. As long as there's general availability, obviously (April 2022, there's a diesel shortage in Argentina). Bathrooms, some are clogged. The men's is the one I'm familiar with. Food, decent for a roadside stop.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10917902775629832707/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMybE5ycVJnEAE

reviews.comment:
La atención en la bomba de Nafta muy cordial y rápida.
Al baño le falta un poco de mantenimiento y aseo.

(Translated by Google)
The service at the gas pump was very friendly and prompt.
The bathroom needs some maintenance and cleaning.
